old_exact: [¶2] On October 9, 2014, Friesz shot Geno Jassmann in a home in Mandan, causing his death. While Jassmann was still breathing, Friesz lit the home on fire and left. Friesz was subsequently charged with murder, a class AA felony, and arson, a class B felony, alleging Friesz had intentionally caused the death of another human being and had willfully started the fire.

evidence: Early [¶48] between ¶42 and ¶44 is mislabeled ¶43 (PDF [¶43]='Under N.D.C.C. § 12.1-21-01...person is guilty of arson'). Fills missing 43, removes early dup-48.
